data.name: PUSSY
data.detailed_description: Hentai is not just 2D girls, this is a whole art. And in this art units understand. The game "Pussy" is a hentai puzzle in which you need to move the elements vertically or horizontally to get the finished image. The game has hot levels, as well as a gallery, after completing a level, you can review your victories here. Hentai girls, this is a whole era of art.
